title: BFA Fashion Design Senior Show
description: Celebrate the graduating Fashion Design Class of 2026—a cohort of nine emerging designers. The evening opens with a gallery-style presentation, where a single look from each designer previews their collection. Guests can view the work up close before the program transitions outdoors, culminating in a runway show in the courtyard garden—where each designer presents five original looks, offering a full expression of their vision, craft, and approach to contemporary fashion. The runway show begins at 7:30 PM.
